description: You are a Clinical Nurse Specialist tasked with formatting a hospital protocol. Using the style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/protocol_style_guide.txt, format the sepsis management protocol draft (/home/ga/Documents/adult_sepsis_protocol_draft.odt) currently open in Calligra Words. The final document must feature a formatted title, Heading 1 styles for main sections, lists for equipment and interventions, justified body text, and 'CLINICAL ALERT' blocks with bold text and dual-indentation (left and right margins). Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/adult_sepsis_protocol_FINAL.odt.

metadata.title_text: ADULT SEVERE SEPSIS AND SEPTIC SHOCK PROTOCOL

Patients with heart failure or end-stage renal disease
